# Zitch

> Zitch is a Nigerian fintech app for instant money transfers, airtime, data, bill payments, virtual dollar cards, savings, loans and multi-currency wallets — plus full banking inside WhatsApp.

Zitch is operated by Zitch Technologies Limited in partnership with CBN-licensed financial institutions. Every transaction is authorised by the user's PIN, fingerprint or Face ID, protected by BVN/NIN and face-verification KYC, and recorded in an append-only audit trail. Zitch is available on Android and iOS, and customers can also bank by chatting with Zitch on WhatsApp in plain language.

## What you can do with Zitch
- Send money: instant transfers to any Nigerian bank; free Zitch-to-Zitch transfers.
- Airtime & data: top up MTN, Airtel, Glo and 9mobile, with up to 3% back.
- Bills: electricity for all discos (prepaid and postpaid) and cable TV (DStv, GOtv, StarTimes).
- Virtual dollar cards: spend a USD wallet anywhere online.
- Fixed savings: lock funds and earn up to 18% per annum.
- Loans: quick credit with clear terms, repaid in-app.
- Multi-currency: hold and convert NGN, USD, GBP, CAD and CNY at honest, time-boxed rates.
- WhatsApp banking: check balances, send money and pay bills by chat — money only moves after PIN or biometric approval.

## Key facts
- Company: Zitch Technologies Limited
- Country: Nigeria (based in Ketu, Lagos)
- Platforms: Android and iOS, plus WhatsApp banking
- Pricing: free to download and open an account; free Zitch-to-Zitch transfers
- Support hours: 8am–8pm daily

## Contact
- Email: support@zitch.ng

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/zitchng
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/zitchng
